caption: On a brightly lit stage with a dark blue backdrop and pink neon accents, three people are seated in gold-colored chairs. On the left, a man with dark hair and a beard wears a white button-down shirt and grey trousers, resting his hands in his lap. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt with a white graphic and black pants. On the right, a man wears a light blue shirt under a grey blazer and grey trousers. He is actively speaking, gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. In front of the man on the left is a white, rectangular technical device with various ports and components. As the scene progresses, the man in the blazer continues to talk and move his hands, while the other two listen attentively, maintaining relatively still postures. No legible text or logos are visible on the screen.
